title: grubby bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[8.40-83.0.1]
- Handle cleanup of modules.* for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18493431]
- Pick a suitable default kernel to boot if the current option is removed [Orabug: 22738301]
- Set whatever entry before saved entry
- Set different titles for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18504756] (Kevin Lyons)
- Do not add /boot twice for btrfs subvolumes [Orabug: 34380742]

[8.40-83]
- Update cfg when setting a default kernel
  Resolves:#RHEL-101784

[8.40-82]
- Fix riscv64 build
  Resolves: RHEL-85989

[8.40-81]
- grubby-bls: in s390* systems, run zipl on grub cfg update event
  Fixes previous commit and formats better the conditions that trigger grub cfg updates
  Resolves: #RHEL-36092

[8.40-80]
- grubby-bls: on PPC systems, remove petiboot's version checks
  Resolves: #RHEL-70194

[8.40-79]
- grubby-bls: in s390* systems, run zipl on grub cfg update event
  Resolves: #RHEL-36092

[8.40-78]
- On grub cfg updates, run grub2-mkconfig for Xen systems
  Resolves: #RHEL-70200
full_text:
[8.40-83.0.1]
- Handle cleanup of modules.* for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18493431]
- Pick a suitable default kernel to boot if the current option is removed [Orabug: 22738301]
- Set whatever entry before saved entry
- Set different titles for RHCK and UEK [Orabug: 18504756] (Kevin Lyons)
- Do not add /boot twice for btrfs subvolumes [Orabug: 34380742]

[8.40-83]
- Update cfg when setting a default kernel
  Resolves:#RHEL-101784

[8.40-82]
- Fix riscv64 build
  Resolves: RHEL-85989

[8.40-81]
- grubby-bls: in s390* systems, run zipl on grub cfg update event
  Fixes previous commit and formats better the conditions that trigger grub cfg updates
  Resolves: #RHEL-36092

[8.40-80]
- grubby-bls: on PPC systems, remove petiboot's version checks
  Resolves: #RHEL-70194

[8.40-79]
- grubby-bls: in s390* systems, run zipl on grub cfg update event
  Resolves: #RHEL-36092

[8.40-78]
- On grub cfg updates, run grub2-mkconfig for Xen systems
  Resolves: #RHEL-70200

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20099-0.html
